subject: DevOps
title: CALMS Framework
description: A micro-lesson that makes CALMS Framework usable.

hook.text: How do you measure if an organization is really doing DevOps? The CALMS framework checks five dimensions.

buildup.text: C is Culture: collaboration over blame. A is Automation: remove manual toil from the pipeline.

discovery.text: L is Lean: reduce waste and batch sizes. M is Measurement: track everything that matters.

twist.text: S is Sharing: knowledge must flow freely between teams. Silos kill DevOps faster than bad tools.

climax.text: CALMS is a maturity checklist. Score low on any letter and your DevOps transformation will stall.

punchline.text: Culture, Automation, Lean, Measurement, Sharing. CALMS.

quiz.question: What does the S in CALMS stand for?
